name: Card
import: import { Card, CardHeader, CardContent, CardFooter } from '@/components/ui/card'
description: M3 surface container with tonal elevation. Uses surface-container color tokens and rounded-xl (12-16px) radius instead of box shadows.
example:
Section Title

 Content here
never: Never use raw <div> for content sections -- use Card
Never use box shadows for elevation -- use M3 tonal elevation (surface-container levels)
Never use sharp corners -- M3 cards use rounded-xl (12px) or rounded-2xl (16px)
